chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 923 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of cases For hearing of main case 16.11.2022 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks directions to respondents to construct the link road from Sakhi Saeed Lakho to Village Achar Lakho, Taluka Bhiria, District Naushahro Feroze after completing all legal and codeal formalities as the petitioner is being deprived from the basic facility of the road. In response, the respondent No.5 (Deputy Secretary (Coordination) Planning and Development Department, Government of Sindh) has filed his comments, wherein it has been stated that the length of subject road from village Sakhi Saeed Lakho to village Achar Lakho is less than 03 kilometers which comes under the domain of District Development portfolio, District Naushahro Feroze, hence there is no direct or indirect involvement of P&D Department in this matter as such the road does not comes in the purview of the Provincial Development Working Party (PDWP). Learned counsel for the petitioner on being satisfied with the aforementioned comments of respondent No.2, does not press this petition, however, states that the petitioner for redressal of his grievances shall approach the concerned department. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of as not pressed leaving the petitioner to avail his remedy by approaching the concerned quarters for redressal of his grievance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
